sentence: 冬天街上常有人卖新鲜甘蔗汁。
pinyin: Dōngtiān jiēshàng cháng yǒu rén mài xīnxiān gānzhè zhī.
english: In winter, people on the street often sell fresh sugarcane juice.

sentence: 年满十八岁的公民都享有选举权。
pinyin: Nián mǎn shíbā suì de gōngmín dōu xiǎngyǒu xuǎnjǔquán.
english: All citizens who are at least eighteen years old have the right to vote.

sentence: 这个新区开通轨道交通后，房价涨了不少。
pinyin: Zhège xīn qū kāitōng guǐdào jiāotōng hòu, fángjià zhǎngle bù shǎo.
english: After the new district got metro access, property prices rose quite a bit.

meaning: to sing the lead vocals; lead singer
sentence: 乐队的主唱嗓音很特别，一听就能认出来。
pinyin: Yuèduì de zhǔchàng sǎngyīn hěn tèbié, yī tīng jiù néng rènchūlái.
english: The band's lead singer has a very distinctive voice — you can recognize it instantly.

sentence: 那部电影的画面非常超现实，看完觉得很奇妙。
pinyin: Nà bù diànyǐng de huàmiàn fēicháng chāo xiànshí, kàn wán juéde hěn qímiào.
english: That film's visuals were extremely surreal — I felt a sense of wonder after watching it.
